title: Schematize RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1
description: Authors schemas/_instances/rules/RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1.json from EB-agent-proposed rule (FU-RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 in EB register, P2). Rule lands at maturity-ladder entry point: working-model lifecycleStatus + working-model activeTier; terminalTier automated via extension to pr-mergeability-check.yml. No promotion in this deliverable — rule enters the pipeline at the bottom rung; future deliverable builds the workflow extension that promotes it to automated. Cross-chat-relay credit per attribution pattern. Closes FU-RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1.

outputs.description: schemas/_instances/rules/RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1.json — rule instance at working-model entry point.
acceptanceCriteria: automationPath in gateActions.human-loop references pr-mergeability-check.yml extension
gateActions defined for human-loop, automated, refine tiers
authority.author credits EB-agent per cross-chat-relay attribution pattern
Origin incident (PR #269) captured in rationale + notes fields
Notes references truth-delivered.schema.json as concrete substrate artifact option

outputs.description: Prospective deliverable spec — S4 → S5 → S6 across dispatch; S7/S8 post-merge.

preMerge: Rule instance validates against rule.schema.json v1.2.0 with forbidden-audit-paint-names allOf
Deliverable spec validates against deliverable.schema.json v1.1.0
All CI workflows green (instance-validation, refs-check, pr-mergeability, amendment-scope-overlap)
postMerge: Seven rule instances now exist on main (6 prior + this one)

transitions.trigger: Dispatch authored after FU-D-5e close (f9b30ff). Schematization of second EB-agent-proposed rule per cross-chat-relay pattern.
PROCEED STEP 2 issued; rule instance authored and validates against rule.schema.json v1.2.0
Squash merge to main via MERGE PR 82
Post-merge: 7 rule instances on main, refs clean. FU-RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 closed.

notes: Fourth deliverable in FU-D-5 second wave. Closes FU-RULE-L4-OVERRIDE-SUBSTRATE-ARTIFACT-1 (EB register). Pairs with RULE-CI-UNSTABLE-GATES-IDENTICALLY-RED-1 — UNSTABLE rule provides override mechanism, this rule requires substrate artifact accompanying override. Future promotion deliverable builds the pr-mergeability-check.yml extension that promotes the rule to automated activeTier.
